title: MappingTask
description: A gold mapping task: maps a source payload to a target contract, including expected mappings, missing fields, and ambiguous fields

source_model.description: Model name within the source system

target_model.description: Target unified model name, e.g. job, candidate, employee

target_contract_version.description: Version of the target contract, e.g. v1

source_payload.description: The raw source payload to be mapped

target_fields.description: List of unified target field names that should be populated

expected_mapping.description: Gold mapping: target_field -> source_field_path expression. Empty object means abstain.

missing_fields.description: Target fields that cannot be mapped from the source payload

ambiguous_fields.description: Fields where the mapping is unclear or requires operator review

notes.description: Human-readable notes about mapping decisions, caveats, or edge cases

split.description: Dataset split this task belongs to
